ogTitle: Waubra vs Waurn Ponds: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Waubra and Waurn Ponds.
heading: Waubra vs Waurn Ponds — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Waubra, Victoria and Waurn Ponds, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Waubra has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Waurn Ponds (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Waubra or Waurn Ponds safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Waubra has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Waurn Ponds scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Waubra scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Waurn Ponds scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Waubra or Waurn Ponds?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Waubra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
